title: Thanksgiving Dinner 感恩节
scene: 一家人围坐在餐桌旁，准备享用感恩节晚餐。

lines.en: Emma, can you help me set the table?
Sure, Dad! What do we need?
lines.zh: 当然，爸爸！我们需要什么？

lines.en: Put the plates, forks, and knives out for everyone.
lines.zh: 把盘子、叉子和刀摆出来给每个人。

lines.en: Done! Wow, the turkey looks amazing!
lines.zh: 好了！哇，火鸡看起来太棒了！

lines.en: Mom spent all day cooking. What are you thankful for?
lines.zh: 妈妈做了一整天。你感恩什么？

lines.en: I am thankful for my family and good food!
lines.zh: 我感恩我的家人和美食！

lines.en: I am thankful for all of you too.
lines.zh: 我也感恩你们每一个人。

lines.en: Can we eat now? I am so hungry!
lines.zh: 我们可以吃了吗？我好饿！

lines.en: Yes! Let everyone sit down first.
